title: Eddy — fluid studio
description: A real-time, from-scratch incompressible Navier–Stokes fluid studio in pure TypeScript. Stable Fluids with semi-Lagrangian + MacCormack advection, a choice of pressure-projection Poisson solvers — red-black SOR or matrix-free Jacobi-preconditioned Conjugate Gradients — vorticity confinement, a Boussinesq temperature field driving real thermal convection, a reactive combustion model (an advected fuel field that ignites, releases heat and burns down) with variable-density buoyancy, RGB ink, and arbitrary solid obstacles. Eleven scenes — von Kármán vortex street, Rayleigh–Bénard convection, a buoyant plume, Kelvin–Helmholtz shear, the lid-driven-cavity benchmark, and a self-sustaining Fire — plus dye/speed/vorticity/pressure/temperature views, animated Line Integral Convolution, schlieren and Q-criterion vortex-core flow visualisation, streamline + tracer-particle overlays, a live hover probe, WebM capture, energy/divergence diagnostics, and a 25-check numerical verification suite that proves the solver's invariants live in the browser.
